lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੋ ਪਾਪੁ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਪਾਪੇ ਪਚਹਿ ਪਚਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paapo paap kamaavade paape pacheh pachaae |
lines.english: Those who sin again and again, shall rot and die in sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੁਣਦਾ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਕਿਉ ਮੁਕਰਿ ਪਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh sunadaa vekhadaa kiau mukar peaa jaae |
lines.english: He hears and sees everything. How can anyone deny Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh nadar na aavee manamukh boojh na paae |
lines.english: God's Glance of Grace does not come to them; those self-willed manmukhs do not obtain understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਵੇਖਾਲੇ ਸੋਈ ਵੇਖੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇ ॥੪॥੨੩॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: jis vekhaale soee vekhai naanak guramukh paae |4|23|56|
lines.english: They alone see the Lord, unto whom He reveals Himself. O Nanak, the Gurmukhs find Him. ||4||23||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasai naame rahai samaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He dwells in the mind, and one remains immersed in His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਤੁਟਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਪੀੜ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur rog na tuttee haumai peerr na jaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the disease is not cured, and the pain of egotism is not removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sreeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har paaeeai bin sabadai bharam bhulaae |1|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord is found; without the Shabad, people wander, deceived by doubt. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re nij ghar vaasaa hoe |
lines.english: O mind, dwell in the balanced state of your own inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਤੂ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam saalaeh too fir aavan jaan na hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Praise the Lord's Name, and you shall no longer come and go in reincarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har iko daataa varatadaa doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: The One Lord alone is the Giver, pervading everywhere. There is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਦਰੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh nadaree andar vekhadaa jai bhaavai tai dee |2|
lines.english: Everything is within the Lord's Glance of Grace. As He wishes, He gives. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad saalaahee man vasai sahaje hee sukh hoe |
lines.english: Praise the Word of the Shabad, and He shall come to dwell in your mind; you shall be blessed with intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਸਭਾ ਗਣਤ ਹੈ ਗਣਤੈ ਨਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai sabhaa ganat hai ganatai nau sukh naeh |
lines.english: In egotism, all must account for their actions. In this accounting, there is no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਬਿਖੁ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bikh kee kaar kamaavanee bikh hee maeh samaeh |
lines.english: Acting in evil and corruption, people are immersed in corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਤਿਸੈ ਦਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis daa tisai daa aadhaar |
lines.english: Body and soul all belong to Him; He is the Support of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਠਉਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੀ ਜਮਪੁਰਿ ਦੂਖ ਸਹਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin naavai tthaur na paaeinee jamapur dookh sahaeh |3|
lines.english: Without the Name, they find no place of rest. In the City of Death, they suffer in agony. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਤਾ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee bujheeai taa paae mokh duaar |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, understanding comes, and then the Door of Liberation is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੨੪॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaeh toon ant na paaraavaar |4|24|57|
lines.english: O Nanak, sing the Praises of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He has no end or limitation. ||4||24||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee sach paaeaa dookh nivaaranahaar |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they obtain the True One, the Destroyer of pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa anand sadaa sukh hai jinaa sach naam aadhaar |
lines.english: Those who have the Support of the True Name are in ecstasy and peace forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saache gun gaaveh saachai naae piaar |
lines.english: Forever and ever, they sing the Glorious Praises of the True One; they love the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਆਪਣੀ ਦਿਤੋਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kar kai aapanee diton bhagat bhanddaar |1|
lines.english: When the Lord Himself grants His Grace, He bestows the treasure of devotion. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re sadaa anand gun gaae |
lines.english: O mind, sing His Glorious Praises, and be in ecstasy forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee har paaeeai har siau rahai samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the True Word of His Bani, the Lord is obtained, and one remains immersed in the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਥੀਆ ਰਤਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachee bhagatee man laal theea rataa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: In true devotion, the mind is dyed in the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love, with intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee man mohiaa kahanaa kachhoo na jaae |
lines.english: The mind is fascinated by the Word of the Guru's Shabad, which cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh ehu rang paaeeai jis no kirapaa kare rajaae |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains this love, when the Lord, in His Will, grants His Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਰਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਰਸਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa ratee sabad sachai amrit peevai ras gun gaae |
lines.english: The tongue imbued with the True Word of the Shabad drinks in the Amrit with delight, singing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਸੁਤਿਆ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sansaa ihu sansaar hai sutiaa rain vihaae |
lines.english: This world is an illusion; people pass their life-nights sleeping.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਕਢਿ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਲਇਓਨੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik aapanai bhaanai kadt leian aape leon milaae |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of His Will, He lifts some out, and unites them with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee aap man vasiaa maaeaa mohu chukaae |
lines.english: He Himself abides in the mind, and drives out attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਵਡਾਈ ਦਿਤੀਅਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap vaddaaee diteean guramukh dee bujhaae |3|
lines.english: He Himself bestows glorious greatness; He inspires the Gurmukh to understand. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਭੁਲਿਆ ਲਏ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa daataa ek hai bhuliaa le samajhaae |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of all. He corrects those who make mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਅਨੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਛਡਿਅਨੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik aape aap khuaaeian doojai chhaddian laae |
lines.english: He Himself has deceived some, and attached them to duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਤਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੨੫॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: anadin naame ratiaa naanak naam samaae |4|25|58|
lines.english: Attuned to the Name of the Lord night and day, O Nanak, you shall be absorbed into the Name. ||4||25||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee har paaeeai jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the Lord is found, and one's light merges into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gunavantee sach paaeaa trisanaa taj vikaar |
lines.english: The virtuous obtain Truth; they give up their desires for evil and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗਿਆ ਰਸਨਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee man rangiaa rasanaa prem piaar |
lines.english: Their minds are imbued with the Word of the Guru's Shabad; the Love of their Beloved is on their tongues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:
